channel.title: Posts on Tariq Baater
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Tariq Baater

item.title: Dark Store Logistics: Optimizing Last-Mile Fulfillment for Modern Retail
item.description: Master the operational intricacies of dark store logistics. Learn proven strategies for optimizing last-mile fulfillment, reducing costs, and improving delivery performance in modern retail operations.

item.title: The Retail Cybersecurity Imperative: Protecting Your Business in 2026
item.description: As retail operations become increasingly digital, cybersecurity threats evolve rapidly. Learn essential strategies to protect your retail business from cyber attacks in 2026 and beyond.

item.title: KSA Retail Operations: The Weekly Rhythm That Protects Margin and Customer Trust
item.description: A practical KSA retail operations playbook for store and e-commerce leaders: weekly metrics, Python-driven inventory planning, and frontline leadership habits that improve availability, cost, and customer experience.

item.title: OverTheWire: Bandit Writeup
item.description: Complete walkthrough for the OverTheWire Bandit wargame — from bandit0 to bandit17

item.title: OverTheWire: Leviathan Writeup
item.description: Complete writeup for OverTheWire Leviathan wargame levels

item.title: Mr Robot CTF Writeup
item.description: Writeup for the Mr Robot CTF challenge on TryHackMe
